title: aFrog's CPVP Modpack
description: Fully optimized mod-pack containing CPVP optimizers, FPS optimizers and much more!
body:
# 🐸 aFrog's CPVP Modpack

This modpack is made for Crystal PVP and/or Survival. There will be some examples of my FPS with the modpack and without the modpack both on DonutSMP. If you need any more examples you can find them in the gallery section.

![This Image is showing you my FPS on my mod-pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4236252161ee7701dd690da598516da4830cd94.png)![And the current Image shows you how much FPS I get on a different mod-pack.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfd4e9d9dfd012e497ec26be72acfd438332bdb8.png)
